purpose: Contract for the missing AROME-to-FastEddy IC/BC adapter or direct writer.

input.simgrid_output: simgrid/<domain>.0 or equivalent generated by FastEddy SimGrid

required_bridge_dimensions.pressure_hpa: vertical parent levels, ordered from 850 to 300 hPa in the current POC

required_outputs.initial_conditions: FastEddy-compatible initial state, e.g. FE_interp_INITIAL.0 or direct equivalent
required_outputs.boundary_conditions: FastEddy-compatible lateral/top boundary state, e.g. FE_Bndys.* or direct equivalent
required_outputs.metadata: JSON manifest linking source AROME run, valid time, grid, units and generated files

adapter_rules: No synthetic meteorology may be introduced without an explicit field-level flag.
All unit conversions must be recorded in the metadata manifest.
If temporal interpolation is used, record source valid times and interpolation weights.
If vertical interpolation is used, record source pressure/height levels and target z levels.
Boundary sides must be generated from the same parent run/time as the initial state.
Adapter output must fail closed when required fields are missing or contain non-finite values.
current_blocker: The bridge NetCDF exists, but the adapter/direct IC/BC writer is not implemented yet.
